records.question: Which users with account ID exactly 1324757 have post history entries of type 1 or fewer created on or before 2014-08-14 02:02:33?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN posthistory ON users.id = posthistory.userid
WHERE users.accountid = 1324757 AND posthistory.posthistorytypeid <= 1 AND posthistory.creationdate <= '2014-08-14 02:02:33.0'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Id FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.AccountId = 1324757 AND T2.PostHistoryTypeId <= 1 AND T2.CreationDate <= '2014-08-14 02:02:33'

records.question: Which users named mike1886 have post history comments exactly saying "added 104 characters in body" on posts that have at least 0 comments and are linked to parent posts?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN posthistory ON users.id = posthistory.userid
JOIN posts ON posthistory.postid = posts.id
JOIN posts AS posts__1 ON posts.parentid = posts__1.id
WHERE posthistory.comment = 'added 104 characters in body' AND posts.commentcount >= 0 AND users.displayname = 'mike1886'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.Id
FROM users AS T1
INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2
  ON T1.Id = T2.UserId
INNER JOIN posts AS T3
  ON T2.PostId = T3.Id
WHERE
  T1.DisplayName = 'mike1886' AND T2.Comment = 'added 104 characters in body' AND T3.CommentCount >= 0 AND T3.ParentId IS NOT NULL

records.question: Which users named Tal Galili, with accountid at most 93886 and no more than 5 downvotes, whose websiteurl is exactly http://www.r-statistics.com and last accessed on 2014-09-02 14:18:16, have votes created on or before 2010-10-08 and comments made since 2010-09-28 21:09:48?

SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN comments ON users.id = comments.userid
JOIN votes ON users.id = votes.userid
